name: deepplan
description: Evidence-backed plan convergence before AI agents execute.

interface.longDescription: DeepPlan helps agents turn first-draft plans and broad optimization requests into side-effect-free, evidence-backed execution plans by grounding local context, naming material optimization axes, comparing alternatives, critiquing risks, preserving host wrappers, rejecting hidden implementation decisions, returning no-edit plans when repeated optimization lacks a behavior delta, and defining validation gates before implementation starts.
defaultPrompt: Use $deepplan to converge this plan before implementation.
Use $deepplan to compare alternatives and produce one main plan, one backup, and validation gates.
Use $deepplan to optimize a workflow, skill, or plugin by grounding first and returning no-edit when no behavior delta exists.
